compiled_state.title: Implement marker-presence in compute_dir_hash() in ticket_reducer/_cache.py
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Update plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/_cache.py compute_dir_hash() (line 38) to include .archived marker presence in the hash. After hashing event files, check os.path.exists(os.path.join(ticket_dir, '.archived')) and append 'marker:present' or 'marker:absent' to hash_parts. This ensures cache invalidation when a marker is added or removed without any event file changes. Covers SC5. testing_mode: GREEN (T12 covers behavior).

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verify: compute_dir_hash() includes marker presence in hash_parts
- [ ] Verify: 'marker:present' appended when .archived exists in ticket_dir
- [ ] Verify: 'marker:absent' appended when .archived does not exist
- [ ] Verify: cache invalidates correctly when marker state changes
comments.author: Test
